node.name: Temporal Pocket, Nexus
node.description: Shifting colors pulse across the sky, oscillating in a fluctuating random pattern admidst the shattered shards of the sky. More shards jumbled together comprise a floor drifting above the bottomless void.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Akigwe's Tower
node.description: A layer of dust covers everything here. High above, a crystal sits atop the tower before you and slowly flickers from one color to another, endlessly casting odd shadows throughout the cavern.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Battered Grey Raven Prison
node.description: The smells of death and decay are heavy in the air, and smoke rises from towers set at the corners of a wall high above you. Guards have the small office here locked down behind a series of gates and barricades that lead further into the prison.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Front Lawn
node.description: Nothing seems to be alive in this gloom-filled yard. Large skeletal trees crowd the path which is covered with a detritus of their decaying leaves. The walkway's paving stones are broken or missing in random spots, and occasionally a large flat stone protrudes upright, as if it had been heaved up out of the ground.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Wilderness Path
node.description: Enclosing the area, floating shards create a scenery that changes from forest green to fern to moss in hue all around you. Beneath the fluctuating canopy are what appear to be suspended shards of pine-colored glass, creating a transparent boundary that divides the temporal zone from a bottomless void beneath.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Outside the Manor
node.description: Floating fragments of shattered glass create a backdrop of mysterious color that slowly shifts as each sliver rotates, separating the area from the void beyond. A small road paved with mossy cobbles leads up to an imposing manor.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Grey Raven Prison
node.description: Fractured shards of floating glass-like crystal form high walls with rising towers, obscuring the roar of shouting and crashing objects from within the bustling prison.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Clearing
node.description: A vast field spreads outwards, another anomalous area within the fractured pocket. At the heart of the green clearing, a massive metal contraption lies curled up. Glistening scales reveal themselves as exquisitely machined metal plates, and the great eyes of the crafted beast reflect light from their flat glass surfaces. A giant mouth leads within.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Docks
node.description: Fractured slivers of translucent crystal are frozen in place, creating the outlines of long docks reaching out into a complete void. Ropes and nets litter the docks between crates and other cargo waiting to be loaded, blocking access to the piers waiting for ships. An obvious path through the mess leads to a cobbled road.

node.name: Temporal Pocket, Archives
node.description: Coruscating reverse rainbows arc at various angles all around, casting madly flamboyant colors on every surface. A fractured jumble of wood, stone, steel, dirt and bone form a shifting ground, a bottomless void stretching far below. Encircling the area are a series of anomalies of distorted space sitting upon pedestals made of shifting crystal. A short railing composed of coiled shadow is strung between the pedestals, preventing any ventures beyond the bizarre platform.
